tdd_summary.test_function: filters routes by name containing searchQuery case-insensitively
tdd_summary.red_evidence: TS2305: Module has no exported member 'applySearchFilter'

tdd_summary.test_function: returns all routes when searchQuery is undefined
returns all routes when searchQuery is empty string
returns empty array when no routes match searchQuery

summary: Added optional searchQuery arg to listByOwner and getSavedRoutesList. Case-insensitive post-fetch filtering via applySearchFilter pure helper extracted to savedRoutes.utils.ts. All 4 ACs pass. Backward compatible - omitting searchQuery returns all routes.
